description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image with a .gradle cache. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add an apidocs job that runs ./gradlew -Prelease.useLastTag=true groovydoc, archives the build/docs/ directory as an artifact named apidocs that expires in 31 days, and runs only on the master branch of the grabl/grabl project; also add a build job that runs ./gradlew clean assemble. In the test stage add a test job that runs ./gradlew check and stores build/reports/ as a reports artifact expiring in 31 days. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on apidocs and test, executes "test ! -d public || mv public .public", then "mkdir public", "mv build/docs/groovydoc public/api", and "mv build/reports public/", publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch of grabl/grabl.
